name: Thread Creation by a Process Launched from a Shared Folder
notes: This rule triggers when a process launched from a shared folder is creating a thread into another process.
conditions_text: when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
when the event matches Process Path MATCHES '\\\\.*' AQL filter query
TD_list: APPLY Thread Creation by a Process Launched from a Shared Folder on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event(s) were detected by one or more of Microsoft Windows Security Event Log
AND when the event QID is one of the following (5001845) CreateRemoteThread
AND when the event matches Process Path MATCHES '\\\\.*' AQL filter query
RED_list: Event name: Process Launched from a Shared Folder and Created Thread into Another Process
Event description: Detect if a process starts from a shared folder and creates a thread in another process.
Force the dispatched event to create a NEW offense, select the offense using Source IP
This information should contribute to the name of the associated offense(s)
